steps.title: Relate result to evidence
steps.content: The first sentence says bacterial cleaning has produced impressive results overall. The next sentence gives a qualified explanation of that success by describing cases where the strains outperform chemicals.

steps.title: Choose an explanatory transition
steps.content: A would create a false contrast, C would make the impressive results cause the bacteria's effectiveness, and D would only add another fact. The matching transition introduces a qualified supporting case. The answer is B.
